start_day_equal_weight_hold.definition: first trading day equal capital into stocks with available close, hold to final date

each_code_first_available_hold_simple_av.definition: for all codes, buy at each code first available close and hold to last available close; simple average stock return

daily_equal_weight_rebalanced_context.definition: context only: daily equal-weight rebalanced index, not hold benchmark

strategy_verified_frontier.definition: hold_until_exit, step5, threshold55, sl12, tp20, h10, max_positions4, flat
